# ThreatAtlas

ThreatAtlas is an open-source global threat monitoring dashboard for geopolitics, military activity, markets, climate events, cyber incidents, maritime activity, aviation, and infrastructure signals.

## Project Summary

- TypeScript SPA built with Vite and Preact-compatible components.
- Interactive map and globe views using MapLibre GL, deck.gl, and globe.gl.
- 60+ API endpoints for external data aggregation and cached intelligence feeds.
- Tauri desktop shell with a local sidecar service for native packaging.
- Multiple dashboard variants: full, technology, finance, commodity, and positive-news views.
- Rebranded and cleaned for an educational college-project presentation.

## Core Features

- Real-time global dashboard with panels for conflicts, markets, supply chains, weather, health, cyber, and intelligence briefs.
- Layered map interface for events, facilities, infrastructure, chokepoints, flights, vessels, and regional risk signals.
- Open access by default, with removed premium, sign-in, checkout, ad, and upgrade surfaces.
- Local-friendly setup using `.env.example` and optional external API keys.

## Useful Links

- Main app: https://threatatlas.app
- Documentation: https://www.threatatlas.app/docs
- Blog: https://www.threatatlas.app/blog
- Source: https://github.com/hacck3y/threatatlas
